<Component name="Issues"
  var.issuesExpanded="{false}"
  var.expandedNumber="{null}"
  var.fullscreenImage="{null}"
  var.showNewIssueHint="{false}"
  var.newIssueSubmitting="{false}"
  var.newIssueStartSig="{''}"
  var.newIssueTurnEnded="{false}"
  var.newIssueText="{''}"
  var.newIssueVoiceRecording="{false}"
  var.lastIssuesSig="{''}"
  var.query=""
  var.selectedHitLine="{null}"
  var.sortField="updatedAt"
  var.sortDir="desc"
  var.issuesSource="{(issuesFull.value && issuesFull.value.length > 0) ? issuesFull.value : (issuesFirstPage.value || [])}"
  var.sortedIssues="{(issuesSource || []).slice().sort(function(a, b) {
    const av = sortField === 'number' ? Number(a.number || 0) : (a[sortField] || '');
    const bv = sortField === 'number' ? Number(b.number || 0) : (b[sortField] || '');
    if (av < bv) return sortDir === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
    if (av > bv) return sortDir === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
    return 0;
  })}">

  <DataSource
    id="issuesFirstPage"
    url="/__issues"
    queryParams="{{ limit: 20 }}"
    pollIntervalInSeconds="30"
    onLoaded="(data) => {
      const currentSig = ((data || []).map(i => i && i.number).filter(Boolean).sort()).join(',');
      if (newIssueSubmitting && newIssueStartSig && currentSig !== newIssueStartSig) {
        newIssueSubmitting = false;
        newIssueStartSig = '';
        newIssueTurnEnded = false;
      } else if (newIssueSubmitting && newIssueTurnEnded) {
        newIssueSubmitting = false;
        newIssueStartSig = '';
        newIssueTurnEnded = false;
      }
      lastIssuesSig = currentSig;
    }" />

  <DataSource
    id="issuesFull"
    url="/__issues"
    when="{issuesFirstPage.loaded || issuesFirstPage.value}"
    pollIntervalInSeconds="30"
    onLoaded="(data) => {
      const currentSig = ((data || []).map(i => i && i.number).filter(Boolean).sort()).join(',');
      if (newIssueSubmitting && newIssueStartSig && currentSig !== newIssueStartSig) {
        newIssueSubmitting = false;
        newIssueStartSig = '';
        newIssueTurnEnded = false;
      } else if (newIssueSubmitting && newIssueTurnEnded) {
        newIssueSubmitting = false;
        newIssueStartSig = '';
        newIssueTurnEnded = false;
      }
      lastIssuesSig = currentSig;
    }" />

  <DataSource
    id="repoOrigin"
    url="/__repo/origin" />

  <DataSource
    id="issueDetail"
    url="/__issue"
    queryParams="{{ number: expandedNumber }}"
    pollIntervalInSeconds="30"
    when="{!!expandedNumber}" />

  <DataSource
    id="searchResults"
    url="/__issues/search"
    queryParams="{{ q: query }}"
    when="{!!query && query.trim().length >= 2}" />

  <APICall
    id="closeIssueCall"
    url="/__issue/close"
    method="post"
    queryParams="{{ number: $param.number, comment: $param.comment }}"
    completedNotificationMessage="Issue closed."
    onSuccess="closeCommentBox.setValue(''); issueDetail.refetch(); issuesFirstPage.refetch(); issuesFull.refetch()" />

  <APICall
    id="commentIssueCall"
    url="/__issue/comment"
    method="post"
    queryParams="{{ number: $param.number, body: $param.body }}"
    completedNotificationMessage="Comment posted."
    onSuccess="closeCommentBox.setValue(''); issueDetail.refetch(); issuesFirstPage.refetch(); issuesFull.refetch()" />

  <variable
    name="displayedIssues"
    value="{window.selectDisplayed(query, searchResults.value, sortedIssues.slice(0, issuesExpanded ? 999 : 20))}" />

  <variable
    name="selectedIssue"
    value="{!expandedNumber ? null : (((issueDetail.value && issueDetail.value.number === expandedNumber) ? issueDetail.value : ((((searchResults.value && searchResults.value.results) || []).find(i => i.number === expandedNumber)) || (sortedIssues || []).find(i => i.number === expandedNumber))))}" />

  <ModalDialog
    when="{!!fullscreenImage}"
    fullScreen="true"
    onClose="fullscreenImage = null">
    <Image
      src="{fullscreenImage}"
      fit="contain"
      width="100%"
      height="100%" />
  </ModalDialog>

  <ModalDialog
    when="{showNewIssueHint}"
    title="File an issue"
    onClose="showNewIssueHint = false; newIssueText = ''; newIssueVoiceRecording = false; setWorklistVoiceTarget('message-agent')">
    <VStack gap="$space-3" padding="$space-2">
      <Text>
        It's helpful to write down the ideas you'll send to the Worklist. Agents can express ideas as GitHub issues where you, your agents, collaborators, and their agents can all share persistent and durable context.
      </Text>
      <VStack gap="$space-2" paddingTop="$space-2" borderTop="1px solid $borderColor">
        <Text fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold" fontSize="$fontSize-sm" value="Ask the agent to file an issue" />
        <ChangeListener
          listenTo="{worklistVoiceSeq}"
          onDidChange="() => { if (worklistVoiceText && worklistVoiceTarget === 'new-issue') { appendVoiceTranscript(newIssueBox, worklistVoiceText); newIssueText = newIssueBox.value || ''; } newIssueVoiceRecording = false; worklistVoiceRecordingActive = false; }" />
        <HStack gap="$space-2" verticalAlignment="start">
          <TextArea
            id="newIssueBox"
            initialValue="{newIssueText}"
            placeholder="Describe what the issue should cover"
            autoFocus="true"
            autoComplete="off"
            autoCorrect="{false}"
            spellCheck="{false}"
            autoCapitalize="off"
            resize="vertical"
            minRows="4"
            maxRows="16"
            width="*"
            onInit="setWorklistVoiceTarget('new-issue')"
            onGotFocus="setWorklistVoiceTarget('new-issue')"
            onDidChange="(v) => { newIssueText = v; setWorklistVoiceTarget('new-issue'); }" />
          <Button
            label="{newIssueVoiceRecording ? (worklistVoiceRecordingActive ? '⏹' : '⏳') : '🎤'}"
            variant="{newIssueVoiceRecording ? 'solid' : 'outlined'}"
            enabled="{!isWorklistVoiceProcessingTarget('new-issue')}"
            onClick="setWorklistVoiceTarget('new-issue'); newIssueVoiceRecording = toggleVoiceForCurrentTarget(newIssueVoiceRecording)" />
          <Theme size-Spinner="14px">
            <Spinner when="{isWorklistVoiceProcessingTarget('new-issue')}" />
          </Theme>
        </HStack>
        <HStack gap="$space-2">
          <Button
            label="Send"
            enabled="{!newIssueSubmitting && newIssueText && newIssueText.trim().length > 0}"
            onClick="newIssueStartSig = lastIssuesSig; newIssueTurnEnded = false; newIssueSubmitting = true; toTurn('File a GitHub issue: ' + (newIssueText || '').trim()); showNewIssueHint = false; newIssueText = ''; newIssueVoiceRecording = false; setWorklistVoiceTarget('message-agent')" />
          <Button
            label="Cancel"
            variant="ghost"
            onClick="showNewIssueHint = false; newIssueText = ''; newIssueVoiceRecording = false; setWorklistVoiceTarget('message-agent')" />
        </HStack>
      </VStack>
    </VStack>
  </ModalDialog>

  <SearchHitModal
    id="searchHitModalRef"
    query="{query}" />

  <PushSource
    id="issuesAgentTurnEndEvt"
    initial="{null}"
    subscribe="{window.bramSubscribeTauriEvent('agent-turn-end')}" />
  <ChangeListener
    listenTo="{issuesAgentTurnEndEvt.value && issuesAgentTurnEndEvt.value.tick}"
    onDidChange="() => { if (newIssueSubmitting) { newIssueTurnEnded = true; issuesFirstPage.refetch(); issuesFull.refetch(); } }" />
  <HSplitter
    height="100%"
    initialPrimarySize="{window.__bramRestoreSplitterSize('issues', '40%')}"
    onResize="(px) => window.__bramSaveSplitterSize('issues', px)">

    <VStack padding="$space-4" gap="$space-4" overflowY="auto">
      <HStack gap="$space-3" verticalAlignment="center">
        <Heading level="h2">Issues</Heading>
        <Button
          when="{repoOrigin.value && repoOrigin.value.issuesNewUrl}"
          label="+ New issue"
          size="xs"
          enabled="{!newIssueSubmitting}"
          onClick="showNewIssueHint = true" />
        <Theme size-Spinner="16px">
          <Spinner when="{newIssueSubmitting || (issuesFirstPage.inProgress && !issuesFirstPage.loaded)}" />
        </Theme>
        <SpaceFiller />
        <SearchBox
          placeholder="Search title, body, comments, authors…"
          inProgress="{searchResults.inProgress}"
          onQueryChange="(q) => query = q"
          onClear="expandedNumber = null; selectedHitLine = null; searchHitModalRef.close()" />
      </HStack>

      <Text
        when="{!repoOrigin.value || !repoOrigin.value.htmlBase}"
        color="$textColor-secondary">
        No GitHub remote detected for this project. Add an origin remote (or run `gh repo set-default`) to populate this tab.
      </Text>

      <Text
        when="{(!query || query.trim().length < 2) && repoOrigin.value && repoOrigin.value.htmlBase && issuesFirstPage.loaded && !issuesFirstPage.inProgress && (!issuesSource || issuesSource.length === 0)}"
        color="$textColor-secondary">
        No issues found. (Either the repo has none, or `gh` is not installed / authenticated.)
      </Text>

      <Text
        when="{query && query.trim().length >= 2 && searchResults.value && (!searchResults.value.results || searchResults.value.results.length === 0) && !searchResults.inProgress}"
        color="$textColor-secondary">
        No matches.
      </Text>

      <VStack gap="0" width="100%" when="{displayedIssues.length > 0}">
        <HStack
          when="{(!query || query.trim().length < 2)}"
          gap="$space-3"
          paddingHorizontal="$space-3"
          paddingVertical="$space-2"
          backgroundColor="$color-surface-100"
          borderBottom="1px solid $borderColor">
          <Link
            when="{!expandedNumber}"
            width="64px"
            noIndicator
            onClick="const r = window.toggleSort(sortField, sortDir, 'state', 'desc'); sortField = r.field; sortDir = r.dir">
            <Text fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold" fontSize="$fontSize-sm" color="$textColor-secondary"
              value="{window.sortLabel('STATE', sortField, sortDir, 'state')}" />
          </Link>
          <Link
            width="*"
            noIndicator
            onClick="const r = window.toggleSort(sortField, sortDir, 'number', 'asc'); sortField = r.field; sortDir = r.dir">
            <Text fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold" fontSize="$fontSize-sm" color="$textColor-secondary"
              value="{window.sortLabel('TITLE', sortField, sortDir, 'number')}" />
          </Link>
          <Link
            when="{!expandedNumber}"
            width="90px"
            noIndicator
            onClick="const r = window.toggleSort(sortField, sortDir, 'updatedAt', 'desc'); sortField = r.field; sortDir = r.dir">
            <Text fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold" fontSize="$fontSize-sm" color="$textColor-secondary"
              value="{window.sortLabel('AGE', sortField, sortDir, 'updatedAt')}" />
          </Link>
        </HStack>
        <Items data="{displayedIssues}">
          <VStack gap="0" borderBottom="1px solid $borderColor" var.issueNumber="{$item.number}">
            <HStack
              gap="$space-3"
              paddingHorizontal="$space-3"
              paddingVertical="$space-2"
              verticalAlignment="center">
              <HStack when="{!expandedNumber}" width="64px" verticalAlignment="center">
                <Text
                  fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
                  fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold"
                  color="{$item.state === 'OPEN' ? '$color-success-700' : '$textColor-secondary'}"
                  value="{$item.state === 'OPEN' ? 'open' : 'closed'}" />
              </HStack>
              <HStack width="*" gap="$space-2" verticalAlignment="center">
                <Link
                  onClick="expandedNumber = $item.number; selectedHitLine = null"
                  noIndicator>
                  <VStack gap="0">
                    <Text
                      value="#{$item.number} {$item.title}"
                      fontWeight="{expandedNumber === $item.number ? '$fontWeight-bold' : '$fontWeight-normal'}"
                      maxLines="1" />
                    <Text
                      when="{$item.commentSummary}"
                      fontSize="$fontSize-xs"
                      color="$textColor-secondary"
                      maxLines="1"
                      value="{'comments: ' + $item.commentSummary}" />
                    <Text
                      fontSize="$fontSize-xs"
                      color="$textColor-secondary"
                      maxLines="1"
                      value="{(($item.author && ($item.author.login || $item.author.name)) || 'unknown') + ' opened ' + getDateUntilNow($item.createdAt) + ' ago'}" />
                    <Text
                      when="{$item.latestCommentAuthor && $item.latestCommentAt}"
                      fontSize="$fontSize-xs"
                      color="$textColor-secondary"
                      maxLines="1"
                      value="{$item.latestCommentAuthor + ' commented ' + getDateUntilNow($item.latestCommentAt) + ' ago'}" />
                  </VStack>
                </Link>
              </HStack>
              <HStack when="{!expandedNumber}" width="90px" verticalAlignment="center">
                <Text fontSize="$fontSize-sm" color="$textColor-secondary" value="{getDateUntilNow($item.activityAt || $item.updatedAt || $item.createdAt)}" />
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            <VStack
              when="{$item.hits && $item.hits.length > 0}"
              gap="0"
              paddingHorizontal="$space-3"
              paddingBottom="$space-2">
              <Items data="{$item.hits}" var.parentIssue="{$item}">
                <Link
                  onClick="searchHitModalRef.open(searchHitBestBody(query, [parentIssue.body, $item.snippet, parentIssue.title]), '#' + parentIssue.number + ' ' + parentIssue.title)">
                  <HStack gap="$space-2">
                    <Text
                      value="{$item.field}"
                      fontSize="$fontSize-xs"
                      color="$textColor-secondary"
                      width="56px" />
                    <Text
                      value="{$item.snippet}"
                      fontSize="$fontSize-xs"
                      whiteSpace="nowrap"
                      overflowMode="ellipsis"
                      maxLines="1" />
                  </HStack>
                </Link>
              </Items>
            </VStack>
          </VStack>
        </Items>
        <HStack
          when="{(!query || query.trim().length < 2) && issuesSource && issuesSource.length > 20}"
          padding="$space-2"
          horizontalAlignment="center">
          <Link
            onClick="issuesExpanded = !issuesExpanded"
            noIndicator>
            <Text
              fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
              value="{issuesExpanded ? 'Show fewer' : 'More (' + (issuesSource.length - 20) + ' more)'}" />
          </Link>
        </HStack>
        <Text
          when="{query && query.trim().length >= 2 && searchResults.value && searchResults.value.truncated}"
          paddingHorizontal="$space-3"
          paddingVertical="$space-2"
          color="$textColor-secondary"
          fontSize="$fontSize-xs">
          (results truncated)
        </Text>
      </VStack>
    </VStack>

    <VStack when="{expandedNumber}" padding="$space-4" gap="$space-3" overflowY="auto">
      <HStack gap="$space-2" verticalAlignment="center">
        <Text
          when="{selectedIssue}"
          fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
          fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold"
          color="{selectedIssue.state === 'OPEN' ? '$color-success-700' : '$textColor-secondary'}"
          value="{selectedIssue.state === 'OPEN' ? 'open' : 'closed'}" />
        <Link
          when="{selectedIssue}"
          width="*"
          noIndicator
          onClick="selectedIssue.url ? openExternal(selectedIssue.url) : null">
          <Text
            fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold"
            value="#{selectedIssue.number} {selectedIssue.title}"
            maxLines="2" />
        </Link>
        <Button
          label="✕"
          variant="ghost"
          size="xs"
          tooltip="Close detail pane"
          onClick="expandedNumber = null; selectedHitLine = null" />
      </HStack>
      <VStack when="{selectedIssue}" gap="0">
        <Text
          fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
          color="$textColor-secondary"
          value="{((selectedIssue.author && (selectedIssue.author.login || selectedIssue.author.name)) || 'unknown') + ' opened ' + getDateUntilNow(selectedIssue.createdAt) + ' ago'}" />
        <Text
          when="{selectedIssue.latestCommentAuthor && selectedIssue.latestCommentAt}"
          fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
          color="$textColor-secondary"
          value="{selectedIssue.latestCommentAuthor + ' commented ' + getDateUntilNow(selectedIssue.latestCommentAt) + ' ago'}" />
        <Text
          when="{selectedIssue.state === 'CLOSED' && selectedIssue.closedBy && selectedIssue.closedByAt}"
          fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
          color="$textColor-secondary"
          value="{'closed by ' + selectedIssue.closedBy + ' ' + getDateUntilNow(selectedIssue.closedByAt) + ' ago'}" />
      </VStack>
      <Link
        when="{selectedHitLine && query && query.trim().length >= 2}"
        onClick="selectedHitLine = null"
        noIndicator>
        <Text value="↥ Show full issue" fontSize="$fontSize-xs" />
      </Link>
      <Text when="{issueDetail.inProgress && !issueDetail.loaded}">Loading…</Text>
      <Markdown
        when="{issueDetail.value && issueDetail.value.body}"
        content="{issueDetail.value.body}" />
      <VStack
        gap="$space-2"
        when="{issueDetail.value && issueDetail.value.body && window.__bramExtractMarkdownImages(issueDetail.value.body).length > 0}">
        <Items data="{window.__bramExtractMarkdownImages(issueDetail.value.body)}">
          <Link onClick="fullscreenImage = $item" noIndicator>
            <Image
              src="{$item}"
              maxHeight="200px"
              fit="contain" />
          </Link>
        </Items>
      </VStack>
      <VStack
        gap="$space-3"
        when="{issueDetail.value && issueDetail.value.comments && issueDetail.value.comments.length > 0}">
        <Items data="{issueDetail.value.comments}">
          <VStack
            gap="$space-1"
            paddingTop="$space-2"
            borderTop="1px solid $borderColor">
            <Text
              fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
              color="$textColor-secondary"
              value="{(($item.author && ($item.author.login || $item.author.name)) || 'unknown') + ' commented ' + getDateUntilNow($item.createdAt) + ' ago'}" />
            <Markdown
              when="{$item.body}"
              content="{$item.body}" />
            <VStack
              gap="$space-2"
              when="{$item.body && window.__bramExtractMarkdownImages($item.body).length > 0}">
              <Items data="{window.__bramExtractMarkdownImages($item.body)}">
                <Link onClick="fullscreenImage = $item" noIndicator>
                  <Image
                    src="{$item}"
                    maxHeight="200px"
                    fit="contain" />
                </Link>
              </Items>
            </VStack>
          </VStack>
        </Items>
      </VStack>
      <VStack
        gap="$space-1"
        when="{issueDetail.value && issueDetail.value.crossReferences && issueDetail.value.crossReferences.length > 0}"
        paddingTop="$space-3"
        borderTop="1px solid $borderColor">
        <Text
          fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
          color="$textColor-secondary"
          value="Mentioned in {issueDetail.value.crossReferences.length} {issueDetail.value.crossReferences.length === 1 ? 'issue' : 'issues'}" />
        <Items data="{issueDetail.value.crossReferences}">
          <Link
            onClick="expandedNumber = $item.number; selectedHitLine = null; query = ''"
            noIndicator>
            <HStack gap="$space-2" verticalAlignment="center">
              <Text value="#{$item.number}" fontSize="$fontSize-sm" color="$textColor-secondary" />
              <Text
                fontSize="$fontSize-sm"
                fontWeight="$fontWeight-bold"
                color="{$item.state === 'OPEN' ? '$color-success-700' : '$textColor-secondary'}"
                value="{$item.state === 'OPEN' ? 'open' : 'closed'}" />
              <Text value="{$item.title}" />
            </HStack>
          </Link>
        </Items>
      </VStack>
      <VStack
        when="{selectedIssue}"
        gap="$space-2"
        paddingTop="$space-3"
        borderTop="1px solid $borderColor">
        <TextArea
          id="closeCommentBox"
          placeholder="Optional comment"
          autoFocus="true"
          autoComplete="off"
          autoCorrect="{false}"
          spellCheck="{false}"
          autoCapitalize="off"
          resize="vertical"
          minRows="2"
          maxRows="12"
          width="*"
          enabled="{!commentIssueCall.inProgress && !closeIssueCall.inProgress}" />
        <HStack gap="$space-2">
          <Button
            label="Comment"
            variant="outlined"
            size="sm"
            enabled="{!commentIssueCall.inProgress && !closeIssueCall.inProgress && closeCommentBox.value && closeCommentBox.value.trim().length > 0}"
            onClick="commentIssueCall.execute({ number: selectedIssue.number, body: closeCommentBox.value })" />
          <Button
            when="{selectedIssue.state === 'OPEN'}"
            label="Close issue"
            variant="outlined"
            size="sm"
            enabled="{!commentIssueCall.inProgress && !closeIssueCall.inProgress}"
            onClick="closeIssueCall.execute({ number: selectedIssue.number, comment: closeCommentBox.value || '' })" />
          <Theme size-Spinner="16px">
            <Spinner when="{commentIssueCall.inProgress || closeIssueCall.inProgress}" />
          </Theme>
        </HStack>
      </VStack>
    </VStack>

  </HSplitter>
</Component>

**Deliberately left (per the draft's out-of-scope + to avoid entangling the deferred write-path):**

So the button is relabeled but the modal it opens is still issue-vocabulary + still files a GitHub issue. Minor visible inconsistency; flagging so you decide whether to fold modal relabel into the write-path item.
- Line 207 "No GitHub remote detected…" — tied to `repoOrigin.htmlBase` gating, not the trail relabel; left as-is.
- "commented"/comments-rendering copy — the read path returns `comments: []` for trails, so it never renders; changing it is dead-code churn (out of scope per draft).

file.content:
# Before

Committing through Bram (the `/__worklist/commit` route, and by extension
the Commits-tab commit) hangs indefinitely and leaves a `.git/index.lock`
behind. Every commit this session had to be forced through with
`git commit --no-verify`.

**Root cause (confirmed empirically):** Entire's `prepare-commit-msg`
git hook (`.git/hooks/prepare-commit-msg` → `entire hooks git
prepare-commit-msg`) **reads stdin and blocks until EOF**:

- stdin = `/dev/null` (immediate EOF) → returns instantly.
- stdin = an open pipe that never sends EOF → hangs forever.

Bram's shared git runner `git_run_owned` (`src-tauri/src/lib.rs:26617`)
spawns git with `std::process::Command::new("git")….output()` and never
sets `stdin`. `.output()` leaves the child inheriting Bram's stdin, which
(as a long-lived desktop process) never EOFs. So the `git commit` it runs
for the commit route — and the `prepare-commit-msg` hook git launches —
inherit that stdin, the hook's read blocks, and the commit wedges. Run
standalone from a shell (stdin closes → EOF) the hook returns instantly,
which is why it looked intermittent.

# After

In `git_run_owned`, spawn git with a null stdin:

```rust
std::process::Command::new("git")
    .current_dir(&root)
    .args(args)
    .stdin(std::process::Stdio::null())   // <- added
    .output()
```

Bram runs git non-interactively; git never needs Bram's stdin, and this
gives the hook an immediate EOF instead of a blocking read. `git_run_owned`
is used only by the commit route (git add + git commit), so the fix is
scoped to exactly the hang path.

Scope / notes:

- Read-only git spawns elsewhere (`git diff/log/status`) don't run hooks
  and don't read stdin, so they're unaffected; no change needed.
- `git push` (pre-push hook) already works and goes through a different
  path — out of scope here.
- **Upstream caveat:** a `prepare-commit-msg` hook that blocks on stdin is
  arguably an Entire CLI bug — a plain `git commit` typed in a terminal
  could still hang (tty stdin, no EOF until Ctrl-D). This Bram-side fix
  covers all *Bram-driven* commits; worth also reporting to Entire so the
  hook redirects its own stdin.

Entanglement: this touches `src-tauri/src/lib.rs`, which currently holds
the **uncommitted, approved** trails read-path change
(`migrate-github-gh-to-entire-trails`, TO COMMIT). Recommend committing
that item first (it's verified) so the two land as separate commits;
otherwise this fix mixes into its diff.
